title: Constraints
description: Defines the boundaries within which a candidate solution must operate.

id.description: Unique identifier for this constraints document.

performance.description: Performance constraints the candidate must satisfy.

safety.description: Safety constraints the candidate must satisfy.

policy.description: Policy constraints the candidate must satisfy.

compliance.description: Compliance constraints the candidate must satisfy.

logic.description: Logic constraints the candidate must satisfy.

resource_limits.description: Resource limits the candidate must not exceed.

prohibited_outputs.description: Output patterns or content categories that are prohibited.
